title: Camera Inertia!
description: Brings your camera to life with realistic inertia, damage reactions, vehicle bobbing, and mining feedback. No motion sickness, just immersion.
body:
📖 What's this mod?

[NEW] Camera Inertia — a lightweight client-side mod that brings cinematic weight and life to the first-person camera. Every step, swing, and impact carries subtle, physics-driven motion that makes the world feel more grounded and immersive — without ever taking control away from the player.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Vmn5HYMoLKA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Client-side only. No dependencies.

✨ Features

🐎 Horse Riding Rhythm – authentic double-beat gallop with asymmetric head-bob and natural yaw sway. Feel every hoofbeat beneath you.
🚣 Boat Rowing & Waves – the camera reacts to every oar stroke and ripple on the water.
⚔️ Combat Feedback – damage kicks, attack swings, and screen shake make every hit feel real.
🏃 Movement Inertia – walking, sprinting, landing, and falling all carry their own weight and momentum.
⛏️ Mining Punch – pickaxe swings push the camera with satisfying impact.
🔱 Trident Zoom – smooth FOV pull while charging a Riptide trident.
🚗 Vehicle Speed FX – dynamic FOV boost and side-blur scale with your velocity. 🎚️ Fully Configurable – every effect can be tuned or disabled independently in-game.
